summary: After the pushed W1450 nullary-frontier handoff, current source was reassessed for a smaller implementation step under the original four-task contract. W716/W717/W984/W950 are not nullary in current source, and expanding them through existing constructors only exposes eight immediate lower obligations. The existing 2026-06-09 W1450 field-component probe already records those eight leaf goals, so no duplicate Lean probe was added. Product success remains blocked until at least one of those leaves, the W1450 field-data input, or a nullary stable package is proved from real mathematical source.
obligations_discharged: No final original four-task obligation is discharged by this reassessment.
No product-facing Lean source was changed.
The W1450 provider-package expansion was checked against current source at f54abe885afc28ccba7f9d71567a7ba52323699a and narrowed to the already recorded eight immediate leaf obligations.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The four W1450 provider packages W716/W717/W984/W950 were classified as non-nullary package boundaries, not viable wrapper targets.
W716 expansion via W1451 and W717 expansion via W1452 were rejected because they increase the caller-supplied input surface from 4 to 5 and then 6.
W984 expansion was reduced to W944 target no-univ data plus W973 closed-embedding closedness data.
W950 expansion was reduced to W948 normalized-source-triangulation data plus W949 endpoint-localized-unit data.
The prior eight-leaf probe run/w1450_field_component_frontier_probe_20260609.lean remains the canonical lower-frontier evidence and should not be duplicated.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.

The four W1450 provider packages remain caller-supplied: Dbounded.MetrizableWppLimitBoundaryDataW716, Dbounded.ClosedNatTransOrdinaryRelationDataProviderW717, Dbounded.TargetNoUnivClosedEmbeddingClosednessDataProviderW984, and Dbounded.NormalizedSourceTriangulationEndpointLocalizedUnitDataProviderW950.

The immediate lower leaf obligations remain caller-supplied: Dbounded.MetrizableWppLimitRightOpenClosedQuotientCoverBoundary, Dbounded.MetrizableWppLimitSourceDifferenceCokernelPiZeroBoundary, Dbounded.ClosedNatTransOrdinaryRelationPullbackProviderW712, Dbounded.ClosedNatTransOrdinaryTargetRelationLiftsProviderW712, Dbounded.TargetSurjectiveNoUnivMembershipForTargetProviderW944, Dbounded.ClosedEmbeddingClosednessDataProviderW973, Dbounded.NormalizedFixedTargetSourceTriangulationDataProviderW948, and Dbounded.EndpointStrictExactLocalizedUnitDataProviderW949.
Typeclass synthesis does not provide a nullary BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage because Preadditive (Dbounded MetrizableLCA) and later stable instance families are missing.
The W949 endpoint/localized-unit package includes a broad endpoint strict-exact field for all MetrizableLCA cochain complexes, so it is not a small wrapper implementation target.
remaining_work: Prove at least one of the eight immediate W1450 leaf obligations from real mathematical source.
Use proven leaf inhabitants to assemble the four W1450 provider packages and then Dbounded.nullaryW987FieldDataConstructionInputW1450.
Alternatively prove a stronger nullary BoundedDerived.Metrizable.StablePackage by supplying the concrete Dbounded MetrizableLCA stable instance families.
Only after a nullary stable package exists, define the original four-task positive witness declarations and run the Tier C review packet before permitting update_goal complete.
